creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
Hi

e7aa222dd79c6a83ec9632f79a363bb3193a054c was for 3.3.1_1 to 3.4.1. 

<https://www.freshports.org/vuxml.php?package=fish> lacks a VuXML entry for CVE-2022-20001.
